Headline: #49 Western Temporary Southbound Reroute near Western/Harrison
ShortDescription: SB 49 Western buses are temp. rerouted via Western, Harrison, Damen Ogden, Taylor, Western and over normal route, due to street blockage near Western/Harrison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #49 Western buses are temporarily rerouted via Western, Harrison, Damen Ogden, Taylor, Western and over normal route, due to street blockage near Western/Harrison.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
